corrected_fields.summary: The World Bank data query for indicator FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG (World Inflation Rate) on 2026-04-11 returned no valid observations. This is a data retrieval failure notice, not a substantive economic release. The source contains no information content and should be discarded.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source is not relevant to market structure or macro catalysts — it contains zero data. It cannot support any analysis, research, or archival use case. An alternative inflation data source should be sought.
